reviews.comment:
Es muy club desde la adolescencia. Hermoso lugar. Pero hay que decir con muy poco espacio para aquellos que desean pasar el día en el club. Con escasa oferta de actividades para socios de más de 40 años en sede San Martín. Con lo que cuesta podrían agregar más actividades

(Translated by Google)
It's a club I've been a part of since my teenage years. Beautiful place. But it has to be said that there's very little space for those who want to spend the day there. There's also a limited selection of activities for members over 40 at the San Martín location. For the price, they could add more activities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVM1ozaEVBEAE
